'''zabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:numbly|numbly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:numbly|numbly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zabate|zabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zabatesher|zabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zabatesherĂ«m|zabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zabatero|zabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zabateshĂ«|zabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zabateshĂ«m|zabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizabatero|gokizabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizabateshĂ«|gokizabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizabateshĂ«m|gokizabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozabankerom|gozabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozabankeshĂ«|gozabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozabankeshĂ«m|gozabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozabankeya|gozabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zabaterom|zabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zabatemu|zabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zabateya|zabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizabaterom|gokizabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizabatemu|gokizabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizabateya|gokizabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zababate|zababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zababatesher|zababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zababatesherĂ«m|zababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zababatero|zababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zababateshĂ«|zababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zababateshĂ«m|zababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizababatero|gokizababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizababateshĂ«|gokizababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizababateshĂ«m|gokizababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozababankerom|gozababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozababankeshĂ«|gozababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozababankeshĂ«m|gozababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozababankeya|gozababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zababaterom|zababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zababatemu|zababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zababateya|zababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizababaterom|gokizababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizababatemu|gokizababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizababateya|gokizababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠte|zĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠtesher|zĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠtero|zĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠbĂŠtero|gokizĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠterom|zĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠtemu|zĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠbĂŠteya|zĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠbĂŠterom|gokizĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠbĂŠteya|gokizĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafbafte|zafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafbaftesher|zafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafbaftesherĂ«m|zafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafbaftero|zafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafbafteshĂ«|zafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafbafteshĂ«m|zafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafbaftero|gokizafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafbafteshĂ«|gokizafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafbafteshĂ«m|gokizafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafbafnkerom|gozafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafbafnkeshĂ«|gozafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafbafnkeshĂ«m|gozafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafbafnkeya|gozafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafbafterom|zafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafbaftemu|zafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafbafteya|zafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafbafterom|gokizafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafbaftemu|gokizafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafbafteya|gokizafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
